## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing impact.

## Testing

- [ ] Built the affected target(s) in Xcode
- [ ] Verified the changed behavior manually
- [ ] Documented anything I could not verify locally
- [ ] Dependency changes, if any, were reviewed for source and necessity

Testing notes:

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes when relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and does not include unrelated refactors
- [ ] Documentation was updated if setup, UX, or behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or signing artifacts were added
- [ ] Shared logic remains in `Shared/` and platform-specific logic stays in its target
- [ ] Workflow, build, entitlement, plist, auth, or networking changes are explicitly called out below if touched

## High-Risk Changes

List any changes to `.github/**`, `Tempo.xcodeproj/**`, dependencies, entitlements, plist files, auth, or networking code.
